goal: 让 idea 报告通过读者可懂性检查

summary.title: 让 idea 报告通过读者可懂性检查
summary.what: 在 idea-discovery-workflow 中加入 Reader Clarity Gate 和 artifact_quality_gate：最终 idea 必须先写成读者可懂产品卡片，Report Reader 负责复述检查，落盘后用 validate-run-artifacts.mjs 检查 report、source-notes、per-idea JSON/Markdown dossier、source-backed claims、MVP/non-goals、最短证据路径和停止线。同步更新默认自动化 prompt、memory schema、README 和 skill 入口说明。
summary.why: 用户反馈自动化产出的 idea 仍然看不懂。之前报告格式已经要求说明是什么和怎么用，但没有强制从未参与发现的读者视角检查，也没有机器检查去拦住 source map 只有泛化链接、dossier 缺少产品卡片或 source note 没有 claim 映射的半合格输出。
summary.user_goal: 让 idea 报告通过读者可懂性检查

decisions.point: 把可读性放在哪里兜底
decisions.chose: 在 workflow 中新增 reader_clarity_gate，并新增 Report Reader 角色
decisions.rationale: 可读性是产物完成条件，不只是提示词风格；放进 workflow 才能要求 final idea 在持久化前被重写或降级。
rejected: 只在 prompt 里追加一句写清楚一点

decisions.chose: 每个 final idea 先输出读者可懂产品卡片，再进入证据、竞品和 Red Team
decisions.rationale: 用户真正需要第一屏就知道产品形态、目标用户、使用时刻、输入输出、替代动作、最短证据路径和停止线。

decisions.point: 如何防止 artifact 只有格式没有内容
decisions.chose: 新增 validate-run-artifacts.mjs 作为 artifact_quality_gate
decisions.rationale: 脚本能确定性检查 report/source-notes/dossier/product_card/source mapping，抓住这次真实 run 暴露的 source map 泛化和 sources[] 不匹配问题。

rejected.alternative: 只新增一个 brainstorm 或 critic sub-agent
rejected.reason: sub-agent 可以挑刺，但如果 workflow 和 artifact 校验不把它当完成条件，自动化仍可能输出半合格报告。

review_notes: 验证：node --check 覆盖新增 validator 和已有三个脚本；git diff --check 通过。
验证：构造最小合格 run fixture，validate-run-artifacts.mjs --json 返回 ok=true。

验证：对 /Users/zhangyuze/.codex/data/idea-discovery/runs/run_2026-05-30_1622_idea 运行 validator，按预期返回 ok=false，并指出缺 Reader Clarity Gate、产品卡片、Source map access/freshness/support 和 sources[] 到 source-notes 的映射。
本次没有修改现有历史 run artifact，只更新未来 workflow 与校验脚本。

architectural_claims: idea-discovery-workflow owns report readability as a completion gate, not only as prose guidance.
Artifact quality is checked after persistence with a deterministic local validator when shell is available.
Report Reader is a review role focused on reader comprehension and source-backed claims, not new idea generation.
behavioral_changes: Future final idea reports must start each idea with a reader-readable product card.
Future scheduled runs must include a Reader Clarity Gate result and artifact validator status.
Future dossiers should include product_card fields and source maps with access, freshness, and supported claim detail.
Future runs should fail/fix artifact validation rather than presenting unclear artifacts as normal success.

data_model_changes.name: product_card
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Legacy artifacts may lack product_card and can fail the new validator; no existing stored data is migrated by this change.

security_implications: Validator reads local run artifacts only and does not browse or upload data.
Source notes continue to store summaries and claim mappings rather than raw copyrighted/private content.
migration_notes: Existing historical runs are left unchanged; future runs should include Reader Clarity Gate, product_card, and validator status.
Because local Codex skill install is a symlink to the repo, these skill changes are live for this checkout after the branch is used.
